sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56816" key="*kera/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κεράων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, hero worshipped by cooks at Sparta, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0586.tlg001:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
